title: And The Laughter Of The Young And Gay Was Far Too Glad And Loud.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Eliza Paul Kirkbride Gurney, titled "And The Laughter Of The Young And Gay Was Far Too Glad And Loud.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
